name: Entenmann's Fat-Free Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Quaker brand quick-cooking, rolled oats
recipeInstructions:
1. Put molasses, egg whites, and raisins into a blender and blend on high speed just until minced but not pureed (about 5-10 seconds).
2. Empty the mixture into a medium mixing bowl.
3. With the mixer on medium speed, beat in each of the remaining ingredients one at a time, beating well after each addition. Add the oats and flour in small portions.
4. If the dough becomes too stiff for the mixer, switch to using a mixing spoon.
5. Lightly spray a cookie sheet with Pam cooking spray and wipe off any excess lightly with a paper towel. A very light film of Pam is needed just to prevent cookies from sticking.
6. Use about 1 teaspoonful of dough for each cookie and place them about 2 inches apart on the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 6-8 minutes. Do not overbake.
8. Remove from the cookie sheets carefully and cool on paper towels.
